description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows (Qt 6, arm64) that can be triggered manually. Run a windows-latest job that checks out the repository, installs Qt 6.5.1 for win64_msvc2019_64 and win64_msvc2019_arm64 architectures, configures CMake for ARM64 architecture with Release build type, builds the project, runs tests, packages the application with windeployqt, and uploads the resulting artifact.
